summary: Prompt enhancement via chat completions. Degraded chain: primary claude-haiku-4-5 (8s) → fallback gpt-5.4-mini (8s). On no-key or both-fail returns 200 {enhanced:false, degradedReason}. Never 5xx for upstream failures (graceful degrade).

scenarios.name: missing prompt (with key set)
scenarios.note: Order: no-key check (200) happens BEFORE prompt-required check (400). With no key, empty prompt still returns 200 no-key. Live-capturing the 400 requires a non-empty MIVO_LLM_API_KEY (fake key works — prompt check fires before any upstream call), but kept code-derived to keep the capture run key-free.

scenarios.name: JSON body exceeds 1MB → 413 (only when key set)
scenarios.note: NOT live-captured: with no key the no-key early return (L1312-L1315) fires BEFORE readJsonRequest, so any body size returns 200 no-key regardless. Capturing the 413 requires a non-empty MIVO_LLM_API_KEY (fake key works — body limit fires before any upstream call). See generate-413 for the observable ECONNRESET artifact of the same body-limit path.

scenarios.name: normal 200 generate mode
scenarios.condition: primary or fallback returns valid JSON with mode=generate
scenarios.sourceRef: L1376-L1393; ratio clamped to allowedRatios (L1325, L1376-L1379); quality clamped (L1380-L1383)
scenarios.note: NOT live-captured: requires real LLM key + well-formed LLM response.

scenarios.name: normal 200 chat mode
scenarios.note: NOT live-captured: requires real LLM key.

scenarios.name: both models fail → 200 degraded
scenarios.condition: primary returns no result, fallback also fails
scenarios.sourceRef: callEnhanceLlm L1260-L1291 (returns reason); fallback L1356-L1360; degrade L1362-L1365
scenarios.note: degradedReason reflects last failure: 'timeout' if UpstreamRequestTimeoutError, 'upstream-error' if !ok or other, 'bad-json' if parse failed.

scenarios.name: upstream timeout semantics (per-level 8s, not 30s)
scenarios.discrepancy: Plan §6.1 says '上游每级 8s(客户端 30s)'. The middleware has NO 30s ceiling — each level is 8s, total worst case ~16s. The '客户端 30s' is a client-side (chatStore) concern, NOT a middleware contract. BFF contract = 8s+8s only.

scenarios.name: stale code comment
scenarios.sourceRef: L1352 comment says 'Primary: kimi-k2.6 (10s)' but actual primary is claude-haiku-4-5 @ 8s (L13,L15)
scenarios.discrepancy: Stale comment in source; behavior matches plan §6.1 (claude-haiku-4-5 → gpt-5.4-mini). BFF migration uses the constants, not the comment.

invariants: modelId default 'gpt-image-2' (L1324); allowedRatios looked up from mivoModelRatioMap (L1325-L1326)
history filtered to last 6 entries with {role,content} shape (L1328-L1339)
system prompt built from allowedRatios (L1341, L1189-L1201)
response_format NOT set (L1275 comment: kimi faster without, qwen hangs with json_object)
no-key 200 returned before prompt-required 400 (L1312 before L1319)
